content.text: Task list has been updated with 5 item(s).

task_list.title: Phase 0 — Multi-tenancy gate
task_list.notes: Verify multi-tenancy is installed and working correctly

task_list.title: Phase A — Generate feature models
task_list.notes: Run blueprint generation, migrations, and register models

task_list.title: Phase B — Implement Extras
task_list.notes: Implement custom policies, validations, and callbacks (Extras)

task_list.title: Phase C — Verify
task_list.notes: Verify multi-tenancy, API endpoints, and AC status

task_list.title: Phase D — Write tests
task_list.notes: Write unit and integration tests for all models and policies
